scripts.build: corepack pnpm run build:desktop && corepack pnpm --filter @kleiber/web build
scripts.build:linux: corepack pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux AppImage deb
scripts.build:mac: corepack pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg
scripts.build:mac:x64: corepack pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --x64
scripts.build:mac:arm64: corepack pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --arm64
scripts.build:win: corepack pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --x64
scripts.build:all: corepack pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux AppImage deb --mac dmg --win nsis
